by
  classical
  rcases hG with ⟨x, hx⟩
  rcases QuotientGroup.mk_surjective x with ⟨a, rfl⟩
  have hcomm : ∀ g h : G, g * h = h * g := by
    intro g h
    obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := hx (QuotientGroup.mk g)
    obtain ⟨m, hm⟩ := hx (QuotientGroup.mk h)
    have hgq : QuotientGroup.mk g = QuotientGroup.mk (a ^ n) := by
      simpa using hn
    have hhq : QuotientGroup.mk h = QuotientGroup.mk (a ^ m) := by
      simpa using hm
    have hmemg : g ⁻¹ * a ^ n ∈ center G := by
      simpa [QuotientGroup.eq] using hgq
    have hmemh : h ⁻¹ * a ^ m ∈ center G := by
      simpa [QuotientGroup.eq] using hhq
    let z_g : G := (g ⁻¹ * a ^ n)⁻¹
    let z_h : G := (h ⁻¹ * a ^ m)⁻¹
    have hz_g : z_g ∈ center G := by
      dsimp [z_g]
      exact Subgroup.inv_mem _ hmemg
    have hz_h : z_h ∈ center G := by
      dsimp [z_h]
      exact Subgroup.inv_mem _ hmemh
    have hg_repr : g = a ^ n * z_g := by
      dsimp [z_g]
      group
    have hh_repr : h = a ^ m * z_h := by
      dsimp [z_h]
      group
    have hzg_comm_m : z_g * a ^ m = a ^ m * z_g := by
      exact (Subgroup.mem_center_iff.mp hz_g) (a ^ m)
    have hzh_comm_n : z_h * a ^ n = a ^ n * z_h := by
      exact (Subgroup.mem_center_iff.mp hz_h) (a ^ n)
    have hzcomm : z_g * z_h = z_h * z_g := by
      exact (Subgroup.mem_center_iff.mp hz_g) z_h
    have hpow : a ^ n * a ^ m = a ^ m * a ^ n := by
      calc
        a ^ n * a ^ m = a ^ (n + m) := by rw [← zpow_add]
        _ = a ^ (m + n) := by rw [add_comm]
        _ = a ^ m * a ^ n := by rw [zpow_add]
    have hgh : g * h = a ^ n * a ^ m * z_g * z_h := by
      rw [hg_repr, hh_repr]
      simp [mul_assoc, hzg_comm_m]
    have hgg : h * g = a ^ m * a ^ n * z_h * z_g := by
      rw [hh_repr, hg_repr]
      simp [mul_assoc, hzh_comm_n]
    calc
      g * h = a ^ n * a ^ m * z_g * z_h := hgh
      _ = a ^ m * a ^ n * z_h * z_g := by rw [hzcomm, hpow]
      _ = h * g := hgg.symm
  ext g
  constructor
  · intro _
    trivial
  · intro _
    rw [Subgroup.mem_center_iff]
    intro h
    exact hcomm g h

by
  intro a b
  classical
  let P0 : Subgroup G := (P : Subgroup G)
  have hfac : Nat.factorization 105 3 = 1 := by
    native_decide
  have hPcard : Fintype.card P0 = 3 := by
    simpa [P0, hG, hfac] using P.card_eq_multiplicity
  have hQcard : Fintype.card (G ⧸ P0) = 35 := by
    have h := Subgroup.index_mul_card P0
    omega
  have hPcyc : IsCyclic P0 := by
    exact isCyclic_of_prime_card hPcard (by decide : Nat.Prime 3)
  have hQcyc : IsCyclic (G ⧸ P0) := by
    exact isCyclic_of_card_eq_prime_mul_prime hQcard (by decide : Nat.Prime 5) (by decide : Nat.Prime 7)
  rcases hQcyc.exists_generator with ⟨q, hq⟩
  rcases QuotientGroup.mk_surjective q with ⟨x, hx⟩
  letI : CommGroup P0 := hPcyc.commGroup
  rcases hPcyc.exists_generator with ⟨z, hz⟩
  have hzord : orderOf z = 3 := by
    simpa [hPcard] using hz.orderOf_eq_card
  have hz3 : z ^ 3 = 1 := by
    simpa [hzord] using (pow_orderOf_eq_one z)
  have hqord : orderOf q = 35 := by
    simpa [hQcard] using hq.orderOf_eq_card
  have hq35 : q ^ 35 = 1 := by
    simpa [hqord] using (pow_orderOf_eq_one q)
  let φ : MulAut P0 :=
  { toFun := fun y => ⟨x * (y : G) * x⁻¹, by
        simpa [mul_assoc] using (Subgroup.Normal.conj_mem hP (y : G) y.2 x)⟩
    invFun := fun y => ⟨x⁻¹ * (y : G) * x, by
        simpa [mul_assoc] using (Subgroup.Normal.conj_mem hP (y : G) y.2 x⁻¹)⟩
    left_inv := by
      intro y
      ext
      simp [mul_assoc]
    right_inv := by
      intro y
      ext
      simp [mul_assoc]
    map_mul' := by
      intro y₁ y₂
      ext
      simp [mul_assoc] }
  have hpowAux : ∀ n : ℕ, ∀ y : P0, ((φ ^ n) y : G) = (x ^ n : G) * (y : G) * (x ^ n : G)⁻¹ := by
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero =>
        intro y
        simp [φ]
    | succ n ih =>
        intro y
        simp [pow_succ, ih, φ, mul_assoc]
  have hx35mem : (x ^ 35 : G) ∈ P0 := by
    have hqeq : QuotientGroup.mk (x ^ 35 : G) = 1 := by
      calc
        QuotientGroup.mk (x ^ 35 : G) = (QuotientGroup.mk x : G ⧸ P0) ^ 35 := by simp
        _ = q ^ 35 := by rw [hx]
        _ = 1 := hq35
    simpa using (QuotientGroup.eq'.mp hqeq)
  have hφ35 : φ ^ 35 = 1 := by
    ext y
    have hcomm : (x ^ 35 : G) * (y : G) = (y : G) * (x ^ 35 : G) := by
      simpa using (CommGroup.mul_comm (⟨x ^ 35, hx35mem⟩ : P0) y)
    calc
      ((φ ^ 35) y : G) = (x ^ 35 : G) * (y : G) * (x ^ 35 : G)⁻¹ := hpowAux 35 y
      _ = (y : G) := by
        rw [hcomm]
        simp
  have hφzne1 : φ z ≠ 1 := by
    intro hz1
    apply hz.ne_one
    exact φ.injective hz1
  have hφ2z : (φ ^ 2) z = z := by
    rcases hPcyc.exists_pow_eq (φ z) with ⟨n, hn⟩
    have hmod : n % 3 = 1 ∨ n % 3 = 2 := by
      have h0 : n % 3 ≠ 0 := by
        intro h0
        have h1 : φ z = 1 := by
          calc
            φ z = z ^ n := hn
            _ = z ^ (n % 3) := by
              simpa using (pow_eq_pow_mod z n)
            _ = 1 := by
              rw [h0]
              simp [hz3]
        exact hφzne1 h1
      omega
    rcases hmod with h1 | h2
    · have hφz : φ z = z := by
        calc
          φ z = z ^ n := hn
          _ = z ^ (n % 3) := by
            simpa using (pow_eq_pow_mod z n)
          _ = z := by
            rw [h1]
            simp [hz3]
      simp [pow_succ, hφz]
    · have hφz : φ z = z ^ 2 := by
        calc
          φ z = z ^ n := hn
          _ = z ^ (n % 3) := by
            simpa using (pow_eq_pow_mod z n)
          _ = z ^ 2 := by
            rw [h2]
            simp [hz3]
      simp [pow_succ, hφz, hz3, mul_assoc]
  have hφ2 : φ ^ 2 = 1 := by
    ext y
    rcases hPcyc.exists_pow_eq y with ⟨m, rfl⟩
    simp [map_pow, hφ2z]
  have hφ35ord : orderOf φ ∣ 35 := by
    exact orderOf_dvd_of_pow_eq_one hφ35
  have hφ2ord : orderOf φ ∣ 2 := by
    exact orderOf_dvd_of_pow_eq_one hφ2
  have hφ1 : orderOf φ = 1 := by
    omega
  have hφeq : φ = 1 := by
    simpa [orderOf_eq_one_iff] using hφ1
  have hcomm : ∀ y : P0, x * (y : G) = (y : G) * x := by
    intro y
    have hfix := congrArg (fun e : MulAut P0 => e y) hφeq
    simpa [φ] using hfix
  have hcommPow : ∀ n : ℕ, ∀ y : P0, (x ^ n : G) * (y : G) = (y : G) * (x ^ n : G) := by
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero =>
        intro y
        simp
    | succ n ih =>
        intro y
        calc
          (x ^ (n + 1) : G) * (y : G) = x * (x ^ n : G) * (y : G) := by simp [pow_succ, mul_assoc]
          _ = x * ((y : G) * (x ^ n : G)) := by rw [ih]
          _ = (y : G) * (x ^ (n + 1) : G) := by simp [hcomm y, mul_assoc, pow_succ]
  have hdecomp : ∀ g : G, ∃ n : ℕ, ∃ y : P0, g = (x ^ n : G) * (y : G) := by
    intro g
    rcases hq.exists_pow_eq (QuotientGroup.mk g) with ⟨n, hn⟩
    have hqeq : QuotientGroup.mk (x ^ n : G) = QuotientGroup.mk g := by
      calc
        QuotientGroup.mk (x ^ n : G) = q ^ n := by simp [hx]
        _ = QuotientGroup.mk g := hn
    have hmem : (x ^ n : G)⁻¹ * g ∈ P0 := QuotientGroup.eq'.mp hqeq
    refine ⟨n, ⟨⟨(x ^ n : G)⁻¹ * g, hmem⟩, ?_⟩⟩
    simp [mul_assoc]
  rcases hdecomp a with ⟨m, ⟨pa, rfl⟩⟩
  rcases hdecomp b with ⟨n, ⟨pb, rfl⟩⟩
  have hpp : (pa : G) * (pb : G) = (pb : G) * (pa : G) := by
    simpa using (CommGroup.mul_comm pa pb)
  calc
    (x ^ m : G) * (pa : G) * ((x ^ n : G) * (pb : G))
        = (x ^ m : G) * ((x ^ n : G) * (pa : G)) * (pb : G) := by
            rw [hcommPow n pa]
            simp [mul_assoc]
    _ = (x ^ (m + n) : G) * ((pa : G) * (pb : G)) := by
          simp [pow_add, mul_assoc]
    _ = (x ^ (m + n) : G) * ((pb : G) * (pa : G)) := by
          rw [hpp]
    _ = ((x ^ n : G) * (pb : G)) * ((x ^ m : G) * (pa : G)) := by
          simp [pow_add, mul_assoc]
    _ = b * a := by
          simp [mul_assoc]

    have hcard : Fintype.card (GaussianInt ⧸ I) = Fintype.card (ZMod 2) := by
